segments.speaker: JACK
segments.line: We can't keep her here for much longer, Rachel. The KGB will find her.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of JACK, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: RACHEL
segments.line: We'll get her out, Jack. We always do.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of JACK, his eyes darting between the documents on the table, a hint of frustration on his face.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.line: Easy for you to say, Rachel. You're not the one who has to deal with the KGB on a daily basis.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of RACHEL, a resolute look on her face, her eyes shining with determination.

segments.speaker: RACHEL
segments.line: That's not the point, Jack. The point is we have a chance to defect a high-ranking Soviet official. We can't let it slip through our fingers.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of JACK, his shoulders tensed, his jaw clenched in anger.

segments.speaker: VLADIMIR
segments.line: I don't know if I can trust you. I've been warned about the CIA's tactics.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of VLADIMIR, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.line: Vladimir, we're here to help you. We'll get you out of Berlin and set you up with a new identity.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of VLADIMIR, his eyes darting between JACK and RACHEL, a look of vulnerability on his face.

segments.speaker: RACHEL
segments.line: But first, you have to tell us what you know. About the Soviet Union's plans for Eastern Europe.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of JACK, a reassuring smile on his face, his eyes locked on VLADIMIR.

segments.speaker: VLADIMIR
segments.line: I'll tell you everything. But you have to promise me one thing.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of RACHEL, her eyes locked on VLADIMIR, a hint of steel in her voice.

segments.speaker: ALEXANDRA
segments.line: Jack, we have a problem. One of our own team members has been compromised. The KGB has a mole within the CIA.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALEXANDRA, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.line: What are you talking about? Who is it?
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of ALEXANDRA, her eyes locked on JACK, a look of concern etched on her face.

segments.speaker: ALEXANDRA
segments.line: I'm not sure yet. But I think it's someone close to you, Jack.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of JACK, his eyes narrowed, a hint of anger on his face.

segments.speaker: RACHEL
segments.line: Hello, darling! I'll be right there.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of RACHEL, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of RACHEL, a look of happiness on her face, her eyes sparkling with delight.

segments.speaker: RACHEL
segments.line: It's my husband. He's on his way to the safehouse.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of JACK, a look of concern on his face, his eyes locked on RACHEL.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.line: Rachel, I don't think that's a good idea.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of RACHEL, a look of excitement on her face, her eyes shining with anticipation.

segments.speaker: RACHEL
segments.line: Why not, Jack? He's my husband. I trust him.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of JACK, a look of warning on his face, his eyes locked on RACHEL.

segments.speaker: JACK
segments.line: Because, Rachel, we don't know who we can trust anymore.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of RACHEL, a look of determination on her face, her eyes locked on JACK.
